requirement_topic.en: EDL Grid Connection — 220/380 V 50 Hz and Constrained Supply Reality
requirement_topic.zh: EDL并网接入——220/380 V 50 Hz及供电受限现实
requirement_topic.zht: EDL併網接入——220/380 V 50 Hz及供電受限現實

summary.en: Lebanon's public electricity utility context is EDL, and EV charger projects connected to the public network should be reviewed around Lebanon's nominal 220/380 V, 50 Hz low-voltage supply, available site capacity, protection coordination, metering, and any EDL distribution requirements. The practical deployment context is unusually difficult: state-grid availability has been highly constrained, so reliable grid-fed DC fast charging may require dedicated electrical studies, private generation, storage, or hybrid solar-plus-battery architecture. Public EV charging remains nascent, and project acceptance is likely to be site-specific rather than a simple product-only approval.
summary.zh: 黎巴嫩公共电力公用事业背景为EDL，接入公共电网的电动汽车充电桩项目应围绕黎巴嫩名义220/380 V、50 Hz低压供电、场站可用容量、保护配合、计量以及EDL配电要求进行审查。实际部署背景较为困难：国家电网可用性长期高度受限，因此稳定的电网供电直流快充可能需要专门电气研究、私人发电、储能或太阳能加电池混合架构。公共电动汽车充电仍处于早期，项目接受更可能是场站特定审查，而非简单的产品单项批准。
summary.zht: 黎巴嫩公共電力公用事業背景為EDL，接入公共電網的電動汽車充電樁項目應圍繞黎巴嫩名義220/380 V、50 Hz低壓供電、場站可用容量、保護配合、計量以及EDL配電要求進行審查。實際部署背景較為困難：國家電網可用性長期高度受限，因此穩定的電網供電直流快充可能需要專門電氣研究、私人發電、儲能或太陽能加電池混合架構。公共電動汽車充電仍處於早期，項目接受更可能是場站特定審查，而非簡單的產品單項批准。

standards_or_laws: EDL public-grid interconnection and distribution requirements where applicable
Lebanon low-voltage supply context: 220/380 V, 50 Hz
IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC charging, and local grid-operator acceptance. China's domestic low-voltage baseline is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz, which is numerically close to Lebanon's nominal supply but does not resolve EDL capacity, power-quality, backup-generation, storage, or site-specific protection issues.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流充电GB/T 27930-2023通信以及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内低压基线为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，与黎巴嫩名义供电在数值上接近，但不能解决EDL容量、电能质量、备用发电、储能或场站特定保护问题。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流充電GB/T 27930-2023通訊以及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內低壓基線為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，與黎巴嫩名義供電在數值上接近，但不能解決EDL容量、電能品質、備用發電、儲能或場站特定保護問題。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) charger input-voltage range covers 220/380 V, 50 Hz and unstable supply conditions; (2) site electrical design covers available EDL capacity, generator or solar-plus-battery operation, grounding, earthing, metering, load management, and protection coordination; (3) DC fast-charging assumptions are realistic under Lebanon's constrained grid; and (4) EDL coordination is completed where public-grid connection or upgrade is required. China domestic grid evidence is not enough to prove Lebanon site readiness.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩输入电压范围覆盖220/380 V、50 Hz及不稳定供电条件；(2) 场站电气设计覆盖EDL可用容量、发电机或太阳能加电池运行、接地、计量、负载管理和保护配合；(3) 直流快充假设在黎巴嫩受限电网条件下具有现实性；(4) 需要公共电网接入或扩容时已完成EDL协调。中国国内并网证据不足以证明黎巴嫩场站可用。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁輸入電壓範圍覆蓋220/380 V、50 Hz及不穩定供電條件；(2) 場站電氣設計覆蓋EDL可用容量、發電機或太陽能加電池運行、接地、計量、負載管理和保護配合；(3) 直流快充假設在黎巴嫩受限電網條件下具有現實性；(4) 需要公共電網接入或擴容時已完成EDL協調。中國國內併網證據不足以證明黎巴嫩場站可用。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific — mandatory where the charger connects to or affects the EDL public network; for private solar-plus-battery or generator-backed sites, project-owner, insurer, installer, and electrical-safety requirements may be the operative gate
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an EDL approval substitute; site capacity and resilience must be re-confirmed for Lebanon

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Lebanon-ready charger package needs product evidence plus a credible site-power plan. China domestic 220/380 V evidence does not address Lebanon's constrained EDL supply, backup generation, solar-plus-battery operation, or site-specific protection and metering requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向黎巴嫩的充电桩资料包需要产品证据和可信的场站供电方案。中国国内220/380 V证据不能解决黎巴嫩EDL供电受限、备用发电、太阳能加电池运行或场站特定保护及计量要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向黎巴嫩的充電樁資料包需要產品證據和可信的場站供電方案。中國國內220/380 V證據不能解決黎巴嫩EDL供電受限、備用發電、太陽能加電池運行或場站特定保護及計量要求。
